content: Invoice and payment mutations are server-authoritative: use Edge Functions and avoid direct client CRUD uploads for financial tables.

name: Edge function release flow
description: After editing Supabase Edge Function source, deploy functions explicitly; DB migrations update schema/policies but do not publish function runtime code.

name: Snapshot-aware dashboard fallbacks
description: Dashboard now reads daily snapshot aggregates when present and falls back to transactional queries for missing days/today to prevent blank charts during sync lag.

name: Dashboard aggregate wiring
description: Dashboard KPI and chart providers now use snapshot-aware repository methods with transactional fallback, enabling immediate behavior while snapshots sync in.

title: Three-axis invoice state model
rationale: Lifecycle (status), payment_status, and fulfillment_status are now treated as independent axes; approved+paid+fulfilled is the operational completion condition.

name: No auto-fulfill on payment
description: record_payment now updates payment_status/amount only; fulfillment is explicit via fulfill_sale to preserve release control and inventory timing.

name: Void guard with payments
description: Void is blocked when any payment exists; users must delete payments first, preventing lifecycle rollback while financial state remains non-zero.

content: BranchSelectionNotifier initialization is deferred with WidgetsBinding.addPostFrameCallback instead of Future.microtask to keep Notifier.build side-effect safe.

title: Commissions branch-scoped via sale linkage
rationale: Commissions do not carry branch_id directly, so report/detail/payout filters are enforced by joining or subquerying sales.sale_id -> sales.branch_id.

description: create-invoice web calls surfaced as ClientException Failed to fetch when browser blocked responses missing CORS headers on success/catch paths.
resolution: Return cors headers for both success and catch responses in create-invoice and redeploy edge function; verify OPTIONS preflight returns allow-origin/allow-headers/allow-methods.

title: Restored permissive invoice operations
rationale: Payments and goods release remain allowed before approval for operational continuity; approval/void remain available later for audit governance.

title: Edge invoke JWT retry
rationale: SalesService now refreshes session and retries edge function calls once on 401 to reduce transient invalid JWT failures without disabling verify_jwt.

title: Invoice ops before approval retained
rationale: manage-sale now permits record_payment and fulfill_sale on active invoices (non-voided/non-rejected), preserving day-to-day operations while approval remains an audit step.

name: Edge invoke 401 retry
description: SalesService edge invokes retry once on HTTP 401 after refreshSession and pass explicit bearer Authorization headers to reduce transient invalid JWT failures.
PowerSync upload to /rest/v1/stock repeatedly failed with Postgres 54001 stack depth limit exceeded due recursive RLS policy evaluation through current_tenant_id() and profiles policy.
resolution: Make public.current_tenant_id() SECURITY DEFINER (owner postgres) so tenant lookup bypasses profiles RLS recursion; apply DB migration fix_current_tenant_id_recursion.

title: Keep verify_jwt enabled
rationale: Edge functions remain verify_jwt=true; fix JWT reliability with client refresh+retry and explicit Authorization header, not by disabling JWT verification.

description: PowerSync stock_adjustments uploads returned 400 because created_by used staff_members.id values, but stock_adjustments.created_by FK references auth.users(id).
resolution: Write created_by with current profile.userId and sanitize queued stock_adjustments payloads in SupabaseConnector to current auth user id before upload.

title: Invoice lifecycle starts pending approval
rationale: Removed draft lifecycle for invoices: create-invoice now writes pending_approval directly, sales UI no longer shows draft chip/FAB, and compatibility maps legacy draft values to pending_approval.

description: Stock adjustments tabs crashed with SQLite error no such column sa.status because local PowerSync schema lacked stock_adjustments.status while repository SQL filtered by sa.status.
resolution: Add status column to local stock_adjustments schema, run local compat ALTER TABLE migration on startup, and perform status filtering client-side for compatibility.

description: PowerSync upload failed with invalid uuid branch_id='all' from stock and stock_adjustments writes when All Branches context was used.
resolution: Block branch=all in adjustment flows/repository, sanitize queued upload payloads by skipping non-UUID branch_id operations, and delete local invalid branch_id='all' rows during compat migration.
